item.title: Issue #2769 created
item.description:
Repeatability of $rng?next() and $rng?permute()

The specification of random-number-generator() says nothing about the repeatability of calls on the ?next() or ?permute() functions.

For example, what result is expected for $rng?next()?number = $rng?next()?number

Or for deep-equal($rng?permute(1 to 10), $rng?permute(1 to 10))

We should say something, even if only to say that it's implementation-defined.
